_comment: Daily video pool for the autoposter. `pick_daily_video.py` rotates through `pool` in order, never repeating a clip until the whole pool has cycled. Edit captions/hashtags freely; add new entries when you render more videos into ~/videos/_vault and copy them here.

pool.caption: The price we quote is the price you get. 60-second quote, inspected within the hour, paid before bedtime. No surprise deductions, ever. Get your offer at purchasingcorp.com
Apple offers $650 for your iPhone. We pay $855. Same phone, same day, hundreds more in your pocket. Any model, any carrier. Get your real number at purchasingcorp.com
That GPU collecting dust is worth real money. We pay top dollar for RTX cards, mining rigs and whole lots. 60-second quote, cash the same day. purchasingcorp.com
Your old MacBook is worth more than you think — up to $595 more than the trade-in counter. MacBook Pros, Airs, even older ones. 60-second quote, paid same day. purchasingcorp.com
That console you stopped playing? Someone's paying cash for it today. PS5, Xbox, Switch, Steam Deck — we buy them all. 60-second quote, money same day. purchasingcorp.com
That camera losing value in your bag? Bodies, lenses, the whole kit — we buy it all at real market prices. No lowball trade-in nonsense. 60-second quote, same-day cash. purchasingcorp.com
That tablet you never use is worth real cash. iPads, Galaxy Tabs, any tablet — we pay top dollar, same day. 60-second quote at purchasingcorp.com
Don't let Apple lowball your iPhone. They offer $650 — we pay $855, money the same day, your choice of Zelle, Cash App or Venmo. purchasingcorp.com
